tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured laboratory values are within normal limits for this patient, including glucose metabolism, renal function, and electrolytes. No acute or chronic metabolic or renal abnormalities are evident from these results. Continued routine monitoring is recommended.

text.div: Provider Organization: Detská fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou Banská Bystrica

name.value: Detská fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou Banská Bystrica

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
